_README: Copy this file to clients/<your-client>.json, fill in the fields, then visit ?c=<your-client>. Every '_field' is a comment for you and is ignored at render. Drop the hero image into the slot via the live preview — it persists locally.
label: Nome do Cliente — Profissão
_phone: International format, with + and country code. Used for both tap-to-call and wa.me link.
_waText: Pre-filled message when the customer taps the WhatsApp button.
waText: Oi, vim pelo site e queria mais informações.
_placeholder: Short caption shown over the empty image slot (also stamped on the lower-right when filled).
_portrait: Path to a small portrait of the business owner (relative to the deployed folder). Empty = fall back to monogram. Used as a 32px circular avatar next to the wordmark.
_monogram: Single letter shown in the portrait fallback (when no photo is set).

pt.name: NOME DO NEGÓCIO
pt._serviceArea: Small italic-serif line below the trade line. Optional. Single string, no all-caps.
pt._yearsActive: Appears in footer-right, mono caps. Optional.
pt._crea: Brazilian CREA registration. Appears next to yearsActive. Optional.
pt._responseTime: Appears under the WhatsApp button as a reassurance. Optional.
pt._lastVisit: Single static line (used when 'Live ticker' tweak is off).
pt._lastVisits: Used when 'Live ticker' tweak is on. Rotates every 4.5s.
pt._recado: Mock voice intro. recadoDuration is m:ss, animates progress over that span.
pt.recadoTranscript: Texto do recado que aparece quando o cliente toca play.
pt._quickReplies: Used when 'Quick replies' tweak is on — shown in bottom sheet.
pt._photoFlow: Used when 'Foto chip' tweak is on.
pt.photoBody: Tira uma foto. Eu respondo na hora.

_en: Optional English copy. Delete this whole block if PT-only. The 'Language' tweak only shows EN if this block is present.

en.name: BUSINESS NAME
en.recadoTranscript: Voice intro text shown when the customer taps play.
en.photoBody: Snap a photo. I reply right away.
